name: Guixu P2P Network
description: Search, preview, and download datasets from the Guixu decentralized P2P data network. Datasets are published by individual nodes and discovered via DHT/GossipSub.

governance.provenance_hint: User-published datasets on the Guixu P2P network. Quality varies by provider reputation.
governance.compliance_hint: Respect dataset-specific licenses. Paid datasets require x402/ERC-8183 payment.
